visualChannels.comment: The elephant entity implies its weight, working as a unit.
Throw from the rocket. The elephants fall as they would in real life, emphasizing their weight.

contextualAttributes.comment: The elephants are scattered like fuel in the air.

visualElements.comment: Giving reference to the size / heaviness of the elephants.

contextualAttributes.comment: Rocket movement. The underlying physics could be thermodynamics.
